MELItem.Title: Cabin Zone Duct Temperature Sensor Systems

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided associated cabin zone heater is deactivated.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative cabin zone heater (AMM DDG 21-61-05).

ListItem.Para: For zone A1 temperature sensor inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HEATER-CABIN ZONE A and lock with an INOP tag.

Note.Para: The ZONE HEATER A1 status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For zone B1 temperature sensor inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
HEATER-CABIN ZONE B ELEMENT 1.
HEATER-CABIN ZONE B ELEMENT 2.

Note.Para: The ZONE HEATER B1 status message will be displayed.

MELSubItem.Title: Zones A2, B2, C, and D

ListItem.Para: Associated zone trim valve is deactivated closed.
Opposite trim air pressure regulator valve operates normally.
EDTO is not conducted.

Note.Para: Cabin zone duct temperature sensors and their associated trim air pressure regulator valves are shown below.

Para.Emphasis: Associated Trim Air Pressure Regulator Valve

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the associated cabin zone trim air valve closed (AMM DDG 21-61-05).

ListItem.Para: For cabin zones B2 or D:
Set left air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Gain access to the zone trim valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector for the applicable zone trim valve.

Note.Para: The TRIM VALVE ZONE B and/or TRIM VALVE ZONE D status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the closed position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set pack as desired.
For cabin zones A2 or C:
Set right air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Gain access to the zone trim valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector for the applicable zone trim valve.

Note.Para: The TRIM VALVE ZONE A and/or TRIM VALVE ZONE C status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the closed position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set pack as desired.
Opposite trim air pressure regulator valve operates normally.
For sensor A2 or C inoperative, right trim air switch remains off.
For sensor B2 or D inoperative, left trim air switch remains off.
EDTO is not conducted.

Note.Para: Cabin zone duct temperature sensors and their associated trim air pressure regulator valves are shown below.

Para.Emphasis: Associated Trim Air Pressure Regulator Valve
